findings.description: Cloud Spanner instance 'spanner-trade-ledger' storing the global trade order ledger does not have Data Access audit logs enabled for DATA_READ operations. SOX compliance requires a complete audit trail of all trade record reads. Without this, regulator-required audit reconstruction is impossible.
findings.remediation: Enable Cloud Audit Logs DATA_READ and DATA_WRITE for spanner.googleapis.com. Export audit logs to BigQuery for long-term retention (7 years for SOX). Configure IAM audit conditions.
findings.financial_impact: SOX compliance violation — regulatory audit failure risk

findings.description: EKS cluster 'finserv-trading-prod' does not have envelope encryption enabled for Kubernetes Secrets. Trading API keys, database credentials, and OAuth client secrets stored as Kubernetes Secrets are protected only by etcd encryption, not by a KMS-backed key.
findings.remediation: Enable envelope encryption on EKS using AWS KMS key. Rotate all existing secrets after enabling encryption. This is a PCI-DSS requirement for protecting cardholder data environment access credentials.

findings.description: ElastiCache Redis cluster 'finserv-session-redis' storing authenticated trader sessions and rate-limiting counters does not require AUTH token. Any process in the VPC can access and manipulate session data — allowing session hijacking of trader accounts and rate-limit bypass for algorithmic trading.
findings.remediation: Enable Redis AUTH token. Update all Redis client connections (Bull job queues, ioredis clients) to use AUTH. Rotate the AUTH token quarterly per PCI-DSS 8.3.9.

findings.description: AlloyDB cluster 'alloydb-trading-primary' does not require SSL connections. Node.js order service connects to AlloyDB using the 'pg' client without enforcing SSL mode=verify-full. Trade records and account balances transmitted without encryption on the GCP internal network.
findings.remediation: Set requireSSL=true on AlloyDB cluster. Update Node.js pg client configuration to use sslmode=verify-full with the server CA certificate. Update Go risk engine AlloyDB client similarly.

findings.description: CloudTrail trail does not have S3 data event logging enabled for the trading document storage bucket. Access to trade confirmation PDFs, regulatory filings, and client statements is not audited. FINRA and SOX require complete data access audit trails.
findings.remediation: Enable S3 data event logging (ReadEvents + WriteEvents) for 'finserv-docs-prod' bucket. Export CloudTrail logs to S3 with Object Lock for immutability. Set 7-year retention for SOX compliance.

findings.description: GCP Compute instance 'risk-engine-vm-001' running the Go risk calculation engine has serial port access enabled. Serial port access allows interactive login without SSH keys and bypasses normal authentication. Risk: unauthenticated console access to the trading risk system.
findings.remediation: Disable serial port access: set metadata 'serial-port-enable=0'. Enable OS Login for all GCP instances. Review existing serial port access logs in Cloud Audit Logs.

findings.description: WAF WebACL for the trading API does not have rate-based rules configured. Algorithmic trading bots can send unlimited API requests, potentially causing market manipulation through order flooding. Also creates DoS risk for legitimate traders during peak market hours.
findings.remediation: Add WAF rate-based rule: max 1000 requests per 5 minutes per IP. Add managed rule group for known bad IPs. Configure geo-blocking for sanctioned countries per OFAC compliance.

findings.description: RDS analytics database has automated backups enabled with 35-day retention. Point-in-time recovery is configured. Backup encryption is enabled using customer-managed KMS key.

Pub/Sub subscription 'trade-events-sub' handling real-time trade execution events is not encrypted with a Customer-Managed Encryption Key (CMEK). Trade events including order IDs, amounts, and execution timestamps are encrypted with Google-managed keys only. PCI-DSS requires control over encryption keys for data containing account-holder information.
findings.remediation: Enable CMEK for the Pub/Sub topic using Cloud KMS. Ensure the CMEK key is in a different project for key isolation. Rotate CMEK keys annually.

findings.description: IAM service user 'finserv-app-svc' used by the trading application for legacy AWS SDK calls does not have MFA enabled. The access key for this user has not been rotated in 347 days. PCI-DSS 8.4.2 requires MFA for all access to cardholder data environment.
findings.remediation: Migrate from IAM user to IAM Role with EC2/EKS instance profile or IRSA (IAM Roles for Service Accounts). If IAM user must be kept, rotate access key immediately and enforce MFA. Set 90-day key rotation policy via SCPs.
